Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__baseline", sum(up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__upgrade", sum((coalesce(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", 0) - coalesce(up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", 0)) * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__savings", sum(bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh__baseline", sum(up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh__upgrade", sum((coalesce(bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh", 0) - coalesce(up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh", 0)) * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh__savings" FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS up ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.county = up.county AND bs.state = up.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.upgrade = 1 AND up.applicability = true WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/b0feb56e75341b331b5161a930f612cf86497c3164826330cd6a6a3aac7db5a5/a6390ece-0cd4-49fc-8509-cbf26ed0550d/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
